landing.heroSubtitle: Find out where your profile stands, what to improve, and get professional rewrites that help you land more interviews.
landing.badgeText: Free Score · Professional Rewrites · Results in Minutes
landing.speedLine: Free score in under 2 minutes. No signup required.
landing.freeTitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready
landing.featureBenefit1Desc: Know exactly why recruiters pass on your profile — and what to fix first.
landing.featureBenefit2Desc: Get an ATS-optimized CV that actually gets past the automated filters.
landing.featureBenefit3Desc: Every word tailored to the specific role you want — not a generic template.
landing.featureBenefit4Desc: A compelling, personalized letter that opens doors and starts conversations.
landing.valueCard1Desc: 75% of resumes are rejected by ATS before a human sees them. Our AI ensures yours passes every filter.
landing.valueCard2Desc: Users who apply our rewrites see an average 40-point score increase — the difference between filtered out and shortlisted.
landing.valueCard3Desc: Optimized profiles get 3x more recruiter outreach. Every section is rewritten for maximum impact.
landing.valueCard4Desc: Our AI cross-references your profile against 10,000+ job descriptions to find the exact keywords you're missing.
landing.atsWarning: If your profile isn't optimized for AI and ATS, you're invisible to recruiters — no matter how qualified you are.
landing.socialProof1: Went from 2 recruiter messages a month to 12. The rewrite suggestions were spot-on.
landing.socialProof2: Finally understood why I wasn't getting callbacks. Fixed my profile in 20 minutes.
landing.socialProof3: The job-targeted optimization helped me land interviews at 3 FAANG companies.
landing.trustedBy: Professionals from top companies trust Profile Score
landing.step1Desc: Paste your LinkedIn URL or upload your CV. Add a target job for laser-focused results.
landing.step2Desc: See your overall score instantly. Upgrade for section-by-section breakdown with specific fixes.
landing.step3Desc: Use the Rewrite Studio to optimize every section, then export your ATS-ready profile.
landing.bottomCtaTitle: Ready to see how you rank?
landing.bottomCtaDesc: Your free score is waiting. No credit card, no signup — just results.
landing.bottomCtaWarning: Every day with an unoptimized profile is a missed opportunity.
landing.demoSubtitle: From profile to interview-ready in 4 simple steps
landing.demoResultsImprove3: Skills section is missing 4 key terms
landing.demoResultsSection3Tip: Add 4 missing skills recruiters search for

input.title: Share Your Profile
input.subtitle: Add your LinkedIn profile, your CV, or both. At least one is required.
input.sourceSelectionDesc: We analyze what you share to give you the most accurate score.
input.linkedinDesc: Upload your LinkedIn PDF export for the best results
input.linkedinPdfDesc: Go to your LinkedIn profile → More → Save to PDF
input.linkedinTextPlaceholder: Or paste your full LinkedIn profile text here...
input.pdfScanError: This PDF appears to be a scanned image. Please upload a text-based PDF, or paste your profile text below.
input.pdfParseError: Could not read this PDF. Please try a different file or paste your text below.
input.urlOnlyHint: LinkedIn URL is saved as metadata only. Upload your PDF or paste profile text for analysis.
input.cvDesc: Upload your CV for deeper analysis
input.cvUploadDesc: Drag and drop your file here, or click to browse
input.cvTextPlaceholder: Or paste your CV / resume text here...
input.addOtherSource: Want even better results? Add your {source} too.
input.jobDescPlaceholder: Paste the job description you're targeting...
input.objectivePlaceholder: Describe your career goal (e.g., 'Transition from IC to engineering manager at a mid-stage startup')
input.objectiveHelp: This helps us tailor every suggestion to your specific goal — whether it's a job, audience, or positioning.
input.audiencePlaceholder: e.g., Tech recruiters at Series B startups, HR managers in consulting...
input.audienceHelp: Who do you want to impress? We optimize for that audience.
input.validation: Please add your LinkedIn profile or upload a CV to continue.
input.exportLangHelp: Your results and rewrites will be generated in this language.

features.title: Choose Your Features
features.subtitle: Select the optimizations you need. Each one unlocks deeper analysis and professional rewrites.
features.linkedinAuditDesc: Complete analysis of your LinkedIn profile across 6 key dimensions with actionable recommendations.
features.cvRewriteDesc: Professional rewrite of your CV sections optimized for ATS systems and recruiter attention.
features.jobOptimizationDesc: Tailor your profile and CV specifically for your target role and company.
features.coverLetterDesc: Generate a compelling, personalized cover letter matched to your target position.
features.noSelection: Select at least one feature to continue.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Unlock detailed analysis, professional rewrites, and exportable results.
pricing.starterDesc: See where you stand with a quick LinkedIn audit.
pricing.recommendedDesc: Full audit plus ATS-optimized CV rewrite.
pricing.coachDesc: The complete package with cover letter and all exports.

results.atsInsight: Profiles optimized with Profile Score are 3x more likely to pass ATS filters and reach a human recruiter.
